subject: us mso workaround to skip shared vip ports
commit_message:
us mso workaround to skip shared vip ports

Update to filter out cases where ports have no server

Issue-ID: SO-3359
Signed-off-by: Benjamin, Max (mb388a) <mb388a@att.com>
